Then, one evening, Morgan (maybe another doctor?) notices the tumor is getting smaller. For two months, the tumor appears to be going away. In the coming months, the tumor continues to disappear, she can eat again, and her jawbone regenerates. The tumor is gone. The question is asking what the doctors did two months later.
